content:
The Victory Auditor has issued a verdict of VICTORY CONFIRMED.
1. The three Shadow Reports are generated in `g:\My Drive\UCL\BSMA\BSMA ANTIGRAVITY\03_Shadow_Reports\`:
   - `Marrone_2007_Shadow_Report.md` (Multilevel behavioral data; 30 correlations; missing demographics coded as `999 [FLAGGED]`).
   - `Liu_2024_Shadow_Report.md` (Dyadic expatriate data; 52 correlations; unstated/missing metrics coded as `999 [FLAGGED]`).
   - `Akaho_2024_Shadow_Report.md` (Excluded as `0 = Exclude` and `4 = Non-primary study` due to being theoretical).
2. The main coding sheet `BSMA_Actual Coding Sheet_v2.xlsx` has NOT been modified (preserved exactly in its original state).
3. The Zero Guesswork Policy was strictly enforced (contradictory/unstated items left blank/999 and explicitly flagged).
4. All background monitoring cron jobs have been completed.

The project is fully complete and verified. I am reporting success to the user now.
